shipping_time.question: How long does shipping take?
shipping_time.answer: We offer three shipping options: Standard (5-7 business days, $5.99), Express (2-3 business days, $12.99), and Overnight (next business day, $24.99). Free standard shipping is available on orders over $50.

return_policy.question: What is your return policy?
return_policy.answer: You can return items within 30 days of delivery. Items must be unused and in original packaging. We provide free return shipping labels, and refunds are processed within 5-7 business days. Note that final sale items cannot be returned.

track_order.question: How can I track my order?
track_order.answer: You will receive a tracking number via email within 24 hours of your order shipping. You can use this number on our website or the carrier's site to track your package in real-time.

payment_methods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
payment_methods.answer: We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, and Apple Pay. All transactions are encrypted and PCI compliant. For orders over $100, we also offer installment payments through Klarna.

warranty_info.question: Do your products come with a warranty?
warranty_info.answer: All products include a 1-year manufacturer warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship. We also offer a 2-year extended warranty for $29.99 for additional peace of mind.

contact_hours.question: What are your customer service hours?
contact_hours.answer: Our customer service team is available Monday through Friday from 8AM to 8PM EST, and Saturday from 9AM to 5PM EST. You can reach us by phone at 1-800-555-0199 or email at support@techstore.com. Email responses are typically within 4 hours during business hours.

free_shipping.question: Do you offer free shipping?
free_shipping.answer: Yes! We offer free standard shipping on all orders over $50. For orders under $50, standard shipping is $5.99. You can also choose Express ($12.99) or Overnight ($24.99) for faster delivery.

cancel_order.question: Can I cancel my order?
cancel_order.answer: You can cancel your order within 1 hour of placement if it hasn't shipped yet. Please contact us immediately at 1-800-555-0199 or support@techstore.com with your order number. If the order has already shipped, you will need to initiate a return after receiving it.
